response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct performances. 2. First performance: 00:00-00:41, Towa Tokoyami performing 'Palette'. Lyrics found. 3. Second performance: 00:41-04:47, Kobo Kanaeru performing 'Chururira-Chururira-Daddadda!'. Performer identified by voice and on-screen text. Lyrics found using original composer 'KurageP' and song title.
response.global_summary: A compilation of two musical performances from Hololive VTubers. Tokoyami Towa performs her original song "Palette", followed by Kobo Kanaeru performing a cover of KurageP's "Chururira-Chururira-Daddadda!".

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa performs her original song 'Palette' on stage with a monochrome-themed background that shifts with color.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
風に吹かれて 誰も気づかぬよう
区別がつかない モノクロの世界
色を足しても 何も見えなくて
まるで私は 息を止めていた

もういいよ
遠くても叶えたい 私のこんな世界
想いも抱きしめていたいのにな
夢のキャンバスに居続ける意味は
この胸に輝いているストーリー

与えることに 意味などないけど
拾い集めたカケラ失うの？
そして夜は その冷たさを
溶かして 手を伸ばした

もういいよ
遠くても届けたい 私は受け止めてく
涙も抱きしめていたいのにな
夢のキャンバスに心込めるのは
この空に描きだしていくストーリー

そして夜は その冷たさを
溶かして 手を伸ばした

もういいの
遠くても叶えたい 私のこんな世界
想いも言葉で包んだ
夢のキャンバスに 色を足してゆく
この胸に 今輝いて

強くなくてもいい
壊れかけてもいい
この心は永遠（トワ）に羽ばたいて
響くように 塗り替えていく palette
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Blown by the wind
So that no one notices
A monochrome world I can't distinguish
Even if I add colors, I can't see anything
It's as if I had been holding my breath

It's fine now
Even if it's far away, I want to make it happen
In this world, I wanted to embrace my thoughts
What is the meaning of continuing on this canvas of dreams?
It's a story shining in this chest

There's no meaning in giving, but
Am I losing the fragments I gathered?
And at night, I reached out my hand
Melting that coldness

It's fine now
Even if it's far away, I want to deliver it
I'll accept it, even though I wanted to embrace my tears
What I pour my heart into on this canvas of dreams
Is a story drawn in this sky

And at night, I reached out my hand
Melting that coldness

It's fine now
Even if it's far away, I want to make it happen
Wrapping my thoughts in words in this world
Adding colors to the canvas of dreams
Shining now in this chest

It's okay not to be strong
It's okay to be on the verge of breaking
This heart will forever soar
Resonating, repainting, palette.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru performs a cover of 'Chururira-Chururira-Daddadda!' by KurageP on a stage featuring a school-themed setting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ザッと数えて四十名 みんなが目を光らせる
どんな小さな罪も見逃さないように
ソッと息を潜めて ジッと辺り見渡すの
尻尾出したらもう最後 チクリアイ教室

そうよ、絶対に本心は隠しきる
蹴落とすの
わたしひとりだけ生き残るため！

さァ！さァ！密告だ！先生に言ってやろ！
ほらほらこんなに悪いやつらが ひ・ふ・み・よ
さァ！さァ！抹殺だ！悪い子退場だ！
最後のひとりになるまで終わらないわ
チュルリラ・チュルリラ・ダッダッダ！

ちょっと減ったわ三十名 閉鎖空間教室
緊張が走って ビリビリきちゃうわ

今日も見いつけた！
尻尾出すおばかさん蹴落とすの
ブラックリストのクラスの皆さん

さァ！さァ！密告だ！先生に言ってやろ！
狂った頭にメスを入れてあげる
さァ！さァ！またひとり消えちゃいました
最後のひとりになるまで終わらないわ
チュルリラ・チュルリラ・ダッダッダ！

さー、さー、密告だ！先生に言ってやろ！
さー、さー、密告だ！先生に言ってやろ！
チュルリラ・チュルリラ・ダッダッダ！

わたしひとりだけ生き残るため！

さァ！さァ！密告だ！先生に言ってやろ！
あらまあもう、いないの？クラスメイトはゼロ名
さァ！さァ！抹殺だ！先生もやってやろ！
最後のひとりになるまで終わらないわ
チュルリラ・チュルリラ・ダッダッダ！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Counting roughly forty people, everyone's eyes are sharp
So as not to overlook even the smallest sin
Quietly holding my breath, I gaze steadily around
If you let your tail show, it's the end, the snitching classroom

That's right, absolutely keep your true feelings hidden
I'll push them down, just to survive alone!

Come on! Come on! It's snitching time! Let's tell the teacher!
Look, look, there are this many bad guys, one, two, three, four
Come on! Come on! It's eradication! Bad kids get kicked out!
It won't end until I'm the last one left
Chururira-Chururira-Daddadda!

It decreased a little, thirty people, the enclosed space classroom
Tension runs through it, it's making me tingle

Found another one today!
The fool who let their tail show, I'll push them down
To everyone on the blacklist in this class

Come on! Come on! It's snitching time! Let's tell the teacher!
I'll insert a scalpel into your crazy head
Come on! Come on! One more has disappeared
It won't end until I'm the last one left
Chururira-Chururira-Daddadda!

Come on, come on, it's snitching time! Let's tell the teacher!
Come on, come on, it's snitching time! Let's tell the teacher!
Chururira-Chururira-Daddadda!

Just to survive alone!

Come on! Come on! It's snitching time! Let's tell the teacher!
Oh my, they're already gone? Classmates are zero
Come on! Come on! It's eradication! Let's do the teacher too!
It won't end until I'm the last one left
Chururira-Chururira-Daddadda!
